# Copilot Instructions

- Keep this app Docker-free and local-only.
- Use the shared TypeScript data model in `data/` for connector metadata and category options.
- Preserve the bilingual English/Spanish content paths in the UI and seed data.
- Keep the Express API and the React UI in sync when category axes or connector metadata change.
- Update `README.md`, `TODO.md`, and `docs/implementation-log.md` whenever the user-visible workflow changes.
- Prefer small, focused edits that keep the app easy to run from code alone.
